Undid revision [[Special:Diff/1224979150|1224979150]] by [[Special:Contributions/50.174.82.42|50.174.82.42]] ([[User talk:50.174.82.42|talk]]) V-E+F is the same as V+F-E see [[commutativity]]
Polyhedron formula was incorrect. V-E+F does not equal 2. a dodecahedron is as follows: V=20, E=30, F=12. 20-30+12 is not equal to 2. V+E-F on the other hand, does equal 2. 20+12-30=2
/* top */ "mathematical field of study" does not apply to topology, since stating and proving theorems cannot be called a study
